chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I organize my files and folders.
chunks.ja: 今日は、私がどのようにファイルやフォルダを整理しているかについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I keep all my work files in one main folder on my laptop.
chunks.ja: 私は仕事のファイルを全部、ノートパソコンの一つのメインフォルダに入れています。

chunks.en: I name my folders by project and date, like "web app 2026".
chunks.ja: フォルダにはプロジェクトと日付で名前を付けます。例えば「web app 2026」のように。

chunks.en: My folders get messy when I'm busy and just save files anywhere.
chunks.ja: 忙しくてファイルをどこにでも適当に保存してしまうと、フォルダが散らかります。

chunks.en: One thing I want to fix is my "downloads" folder, which is very full.
chunks.ja: 直したいこと一つは、とてもいっぱいになっている「ダウンロード」フォルダです。

chunks.en: So I try to clean up my files at the end of each week.
chunks.ja: だから私は毎週の終わりにファイルを片付けるようにしています。

outline: Opening: how I organize my files
Point 1: where I keep files and how I name folders
Wrap-up: one thing I want to fix

modelTalk.text: I keep most of my work files on my computer. I put them in one main folder. I also save copies online, just to be safe. I like to name my folders in a clear way. For work, I use the project name and the date. That helps me find things fast. My folders get messy when I'm busy. When I have no time, I just drop files anywhere. Then my desktop fills up with random stuff. Sometimes I can't find one small file for hours. That's really annoying, and it wastes my time. So I want to fix one thing. I want to clean up my files every Friday. If I do a little each week, it won't pile up. A tidy folder makes me feel calm and ready. I think small habits can really help me.

chunks.en: I keep most of my work files in a shared cloud drive, not on my laptop.
chunks.ja: 仕事のファイルのほとんどは、ノートパソコンではなく共有のクラウドドライブに置いています。

chunks.en: I name my folders by project and date, like "2026-07 login redesign".
chunks.ja: フォルダはプロジェクトと日付で名前を付けていて、例えば「2026-07 ログイン改修」のようにしています。

chunks.en: My folders usually get messy when I'm rushing to finish before a release.
chunks.ja: リリース前に急いで終わらせようとしているとき、たいていフォルダが散らかってしまいます。

chunks.en: The one thing I want to fix is my huge "temp" folder full of random files.
chunks.ja: 直したいことが一つあって、それは適当なファイルだらけの巨大な「temp」フォルダです。

chunks.en: So my plan is to clean it up every Friday and delete what I don't need.
chunks.ja: なので、毎週金曜日に整理して、要らないものを消していこうと計画しています。

outline: Opening: where I store my work files
Point 1: how I name folders by project and date
Point 2: when and why folders get messy
Wrap-up: the temp folder I want to fix

modelTalk.text: I keep most of my work files on my laptop, but I also back them up to the cloud. That way, I can open them anywhere. I like to name my folders in a simple way, so I use the project name and the date. For example, I write "Report 2026" or "Team Meeting Notes." It's easy to find things later. My folders usually get messy when I'm busy or in a hurry. I just drop files on my desktop and forget about them. Then, at the end of the week, there's a big pile of stuff. One thing I really want to fix is deleting old files. I keep too many copies of the same thing, and it takes up space. So I'd like to clean up more often and stay tidy.
